docs_gate.law: All work remains LOCAL_WITNESS_ONLY until both OAuth files exist and authenticate successfully.

program: LP-57Omega QBD-Integrated Prime Loop Master Plan
canonical_baseline: merge into the live LP-57OMEGA authority instead of resetting it
authority_stack: full-corpus family registry / atlas / archive field

live_law.qbd_law: every loop begins from the Quadrant Binary ignition surfaces, then widens into the whole corpus through the existing control waist and deep root
live_law.overlay_law: AP6D assistive only; it may not replace Hall, Temple, Adventurer, or governance authority

operating_law.novelty_constraint: Every loop must carry a unique advancement tuple.
operating_law.worker_claim_law: artifact + board update + writeback + restart seed
operating_law.pruner_law: compress duplicates and stale mirrors only; preserve the only witness of every live or promoted front

current_cycle_summary.next_restart_seed: C02 -> Whole-Corpus Census -> C03 Witness Hierarchy Map -> C04 Feeder-Stack Crosswalk
